title: bromus maritimus
intro: Bromus maritimus, also known as sea barley or coastal brome, is a type of grass that grows in coastal areas and is characterized by its ability to thrive in salty environments. The medicinal properties of Bromus maritimus include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and even treat skin conditions such as eczema. Bromus maritimus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical use, with its leaves and roots being the most commonly used parts for medicinal purposes.
